channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 62/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 62/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 29.5%.

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Greens select nurse and ‘committed local campaigner’ as Makerfield byelection candidate
item.description: Greens select nurse and ‘committed local campaigner’ as Makerfield byelection candidate

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Net migration into UK almost halved in 2025, official figures show – politics live
item.description: Net migration into UK almost halved in 2025, official figures show – politics live

item.title:
Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: It is a "boost for Burnham", but it's much more a boost for the principle that if you stick to a regional growth strategy for 30+ years you can see productivity and living standard improvements at the end of it.
www...
item.description:
It is a "boost for Burnham", but it's much more a boost for the principle that if you stick to a regional growth strategy for 30+ years you can see productivity and living standard improvements at the end of it.
www...

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Streeting calls for equal tax on income and capital gains in Labour leadership pitch
item.description: Streeting calls for equal tax on income and capital gains in Labour leadership pitch

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Rachel Reeves tells foul-mouthed Reform UK heckler good manners matter
item.description: Rachel Reeves tells foul-mouthed Reform UK heckler good manners matter

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Streeting told Starmer he will ‘challenge him’ in Labour leadership race during 16-minute Downing Street meeting
item.description: Streeting told Starmer he will ‘challenge him’ in Labour leadership race during 16-minute Downing Street meeting

item.title: BBC Politics: Wes Streeting pledges 'wealth tax that works'
item.description: Wes Streeting pledges 'wealth tax that works'

item.title: FT UK Politics: Streeting floats ‘wealth tax’ in bid to woo Labour left
item.description: Streeting floats ‘wealth tax’ in bid to woo Labour left

item.title: Bluesky · @stephenkb.bsky.social: Between this and Wes Streeting’s wealth tax, Labour risk ending up with Starmerism with feelgood vibes.
item.description: Between this and Wes Streeting’s wealth tax, Labour risk ending up with Starmerism with feelgood vibes.

item.title: Bluesky · @iandunt.bsky.social: This is a failure of journalism, on a really basic level, but it is also a failure of political leadership. It was going to fall simply in the basis of what the previous govt did. But Starmer somehow conspired to acti...
item.description: This is a failure of journalism, on a really basic level, but it is also a failure of political leadership. It was going to fall simply in the basis of what the previous govt did. But Starmer somehow conspired to acti...
